# SealMetrics

> Complete analytics for eCommerce. Captures 100% of traffic, powers revenue decisions with LENS AI, and is GDPR-compliant by architecture. Enterprise-grade alternative to GA360, Adobe Analytics and Piwik PRO.

## What is SealMetrics?
SealMetrics is a cookieless, consentless web analytics platform for eCommerce that captures 100% of traffic and attributes revenue using last-click on the full dataset. Data collection is first-party server-side and GDPR-compliant by architecture, with EU-only residency in Dublin — so the 100% capture holds without a cookie banner. SealMetrics is aggregate, anonymous, event-level measurement: no cookies, no identifiers, no individual user tracking, no session reconstruction, no multi-touch attribution.

## Key facts
- Captures 100% of visitors (vs ~13% for GA4 in the EU after sampling + consent rejection + ad blockers)
- No cookies, no consent dependency, no identifiers stored on the device
- First-party server-side data collection
- EU-only data residency (Dublin, Ireland)
- GDPR, ePrivacy, CCPA compliant by architecture
- LENS AI anomaly detection with 60+ rules
- Last-click revenue attribution on complete data (SealMetrics does not do multi-touch attribution by design)
- AI Agent Analytics — tracks ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and other AI agents (free)
- 9 specialized report types
- Pricing from €599/month (€499/mo billed annually)

## Pillars (start here)
- /complete-data — Why incomplete analytics data leads to wrong investment decisions; the 13%/87% framing
- /cookieless-analytics — Definitive explainer: what cookieless analytics is, how it works, what it captures, what it doesn't
- /consentless-analytics — Legal-grade explainer of analytics without consent under GDPR Art. 6(1)(f) and ePrivacy

- /about — Company story, mission, EU-first philosophy
- /audit — Free SealMetrics audit: we run your site through SealMetrics and surface the attribution gap live
- /free-audit — Free audit intake form

- /ai-analytics — AI analytics done right: complete cookieless data + semantic MCP + private AI hosted in the EU (LENS AI). Connect Claude/ChatGPT to your analytics
- /reg-gap-analysis — Regulatory gap analysis for web analytics: GDPR, ePrivacy, AEPD, UK PECR — requirement-by-requirement audit with self-assessment
- /authors/rafa-jimenez — Author profile: Rafa Jiménez, founder of SealMetrics

## Enterprise positioning
SealMetrics competes with GA360 ($150,000+/yr), Adobe Analytics ($100,000+/yr), and Piwik PRO (€30,000+/yr) — delivering enterprise-grade analytics at a fraction of the cost. SealMetrics uses last-click attribution on 100% of data (not multi-touch, not session-stitching, not customer-journey reconstruction — these are explicitly out of scope by architecture). SealMetrics does NOT compete with lightweight privacy tools (Plausible, Fathom, Simple Analytics, Umami, Cabin, Mixpanel, Amplitude) — different category.
